name: Atelier
description: Autonomous Design Agent — generates, evaluates, and optimizes web UI assets through multi-judge Bayesian consensus with human-in-the-loop governance.

skills.name: Generate Design
skills.description: Generates web UI design candidates from a natural-language brief using a multi-model ensemble (Gemini 3 Pro + Flash).
examples: Design a landing page for a SaaS product with dark mode
Create a responsive dashboard with data visualization cards

skills.name: Evaluate Design
skills.description: Evaluates design candidates across the five D-O-R-A-V axes (Design, Originality, Relevance, Accessibility, Visual clarity) using multi-judge Bayesian consensus.

skills.name: Optimize Design
skills.description: Iteratively improves designs through DPO (Direct Preference Optimization) fine-tuning, using trajectory data from accepted/rejected pairs.

authentication.credentials: Firebase Authentication JWT token required for all API endpoints.
